text:
garga       2009-02-02 17:24:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Data-Dumper-Perltidy Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Data::Dumper::Perltidy encapsulates both Data::Dumper and
  Perl::Tidy to provide a function that stringifies a Perl
  data structure in a pretty printed format.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Data-Dumper-Perltidy/
  
  PR:             ports/131165
  Submitted by:   Murilo Opsfelder <mopsfelder at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3351    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/devel/p5-Data-Dumper-Perltidy/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Data-Dumper-Perltidy/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Data-Dumper-Perltidy/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/p5-Data-Dumper-Perltidy/pkg-plist (new)
